description: Plugin-distributed hooks for property-management-residential. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable residential property anti-patterns (protected-class language in an ad/criteria; a habitability/emergency keyword routed as 'routine'; NOI written with debt service/depreciation mixed in; a bare tenant SSN in an output). Set PM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
